posts.author: redditadminssuckit
posts.title: FIRE THEM ALL! EVERY. LAST. ONE.

posts.raw_content:
Pay no mind to the cucks who tell you to worry about how it "makes us look"  or that we need to "take the high road.

Every single commie wants you and me to be murdered and they would laugh about it.

Be smart.  Choose your words intelligently.  Don't say things that are credible threats.  Don't make outright claims that you are going to hurt anybody.

But you're damned well right to say these commies need to suffer a little bit of their own violent medicine.  That's the reason they are so smug and cocky about their violence.  They know we don't do anything reciprocally.  They know we aren't as impulsively violent as they are.  It needs to be expressed that we are sick of their shit and that we are CAPABLE of returning the favor.

I'm not going to go out and target some random lefty and harm them in cold blood, but I'm not going to let some mild-mannered cuckservative shame me from stating the basic FACT that the USA would be better off if communists actually knew a real fear of the "fascists" they say we are.  If we were as violent as they are, they would shut the fuck up and keep a low profile real fast.  They know we are not, but I won't be sad if someone snaps and takes some of them out.  I felt nothing for Renee Good or Daniel Pretti.  Those people would have laughed and cheered if I got killed by one of their antifa terrorist buddies.  Fuck them all.  Let God sort 'em out.
